caption: The image depicts a title card for "The Weird Circle Radio Program." The visual style is a high-contrast, stylized illustration featuring a man in a white dress shirt and a black necktie. He is positioned centrally, with his arms outstretched and a wide, intense expression on his face. Behind him, two skeletal figures are visible, flanking his shoulders within a light blue circular glow. The text "The Weird Circle" is written in a red, stylized font that curves around the bottom of the central image, while the phrase "Radio Program" appears in a smaller, plain white font to the right. A small, grey circular logo resembling a paw print is located in the upper left corner. Throughout the sequence, the image remains static, with no changes in position, clothing, or text across the frames.
